message:
feat(tests): add T6.10 deterministic integration and fault-injection suite (74 tests)

Covers retry policy (C-RTY-01/05), error classification parity (C-ERR-04)
across PG/MySQL/SQLite, transaction retry eligibility (C-RTY-02), circuit
breaker integration (C-FPR-01), rate limiter integration (C-FPR-02), pool
config contracts (C-POOL-02), failure escalation chains (C-FPR-03), and
contract artifact validation.

Bead: asupersync-2oh2u.6.10

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
